nodes.label: AI as systematic troubleshooter
nodes.label_negative: AI providing incorrect or off-topic summaries
nodes.grounding_span: the AI summary can, at times, be more effective than going through the different web search results

nodes.label: AI as sounding board for ideas
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole creator without human input
nodes.grounding_span: it can be helpful to break out of a creative roadblock by getting some AI help

nodes.label: AI transparency and reproducibility
nodes.grounding_span: I would need to know where the information is coming from that AI is using to synthesize the response

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.grounding_span: I don't 'trust' AI enough at this point

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I tend to collaborate throughout a task or to start it

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: It helps me get help more quickly

nodes.label: Epistemic accuracy and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I need to also know the sources

nodes.label: Personal autonomy and skill preservation
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to do my own deep dive research on my own

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for debugging
nodes.grounding_span: I have been very satisfied with quick and effective troubleshooting results

nodes.label: Frustration with hidden AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I have been frustrated in the past when using AI without realizing it

nodes.label: Cautious reliance on own judgment for high-stakes tasks
nodes.grounding_span: It is good for preliminary looks at things

nodes.label: Resistance to AI for deep research and news
nodes.grounding_span: I definitely prefer to do my own digestion of news and current affairs

nodes.label: Verification-oriented — cross-checks AI outputs against other sources
Context-dependent tool use — uses AI when alone, colleagues when available
nodes.grounding_span: it's often as a matter of it being in front of me at the right time
